prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
# The Octopus Who Hid in Plain Sight

Deep beneath the shimmering waves, where the coral grew in towers of pink and gold, lived an octopus named Ollo. Ollo had eight wonderful arms, two bright curious eyes, and one very big problem — whenever another creature swam nearby, he turned the color of whatever was closest to him. Near a gray rock, he went gray. Near a purple sea fan, he went purple. Near a stripy fish, well, he went a little stripy, which looked quite silly and made him even more embarrassed. It wasn't that Ollo *wanted* to disappear. More than anything in the whole wide ocean, he wanted someone to see him — really *see* him — and want to stay.
